mentions.note: Reports Tuesday; stock tends to underperform first 1-2 hours (pattern observed); CEO Mary Barra deserves more respect for delivery. Pull trigger on dip.
Stock jumped 8.75% on huge profit boost and best full-year market share in decade; beneficiary of relaxed environmental regs and tariff protection; CEO Barra confident 2026 will be even better.
CEO Mary Barra exceptional leader; invest in Barra not EV vs. ICE debate; great CEO decides strategy; own GM for her sensational management.
